label: Talent
canonical_questions: What kind of work are you most drawn to right now?
Are you actively looking, casually open, or staying put for now?
Where on the risk spectrum are you — established lab, growth stage, early seed, founding team?
What's your geo flexibility — remote, specific city, willing to relocate?
Any constraints I should keep in mind (visa, comp floor, timeline)?
extraction_emphasis: Capture: skills, looking-vs-staying status, risk tolerance, geo flexibility, comp/visa/timeline constraints, the kind of org they'd thrive in.
